basics.name: Nalini Ranjan Jatwar
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am a final year student of Mathematics Department enrolled in 5 year Integrated M.Sc. course at IIT Kharagpur

education.institution: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur, India

awards.title: DAKSHANA SCHOLARSHIP
awards.summary: Received Dakshana Scholarship which provided free IIT JEE coaching for two years in JNV Kottayam. Under this program, less than only 1% of students are selected from the GDST examination.

awards.title: JEE ADVANCED 2017
awards.summary: Successfully Cleared JEE Advanced and was among top contenders to grab a seat in Mathematics Department, IIT Kharagpur.

position of responsibility.name: GENERAL SECRETARY LIBRARY B. R. AMBEDKAR HALL OF RESIDENCE, IIT KHARAGPUR
position of responsibility.summary: Served as General Secretary Library of B. R. Ambedkar Hall of residence, IIT Kharagpur for the session 2019-2020. Availed fifty new books of various categories to the hall boarders and worked on the digitalization of books issue and return process of the library.

position of responsibility.name: GENERAL SECRETARY TECHNOLOGY B. R. AMBEDKAR HALL OF RESIDENCE, IIT KHARAGPUR
position of responsibility.summary: Currently serving as General Secretary Technology of B. R. Ambedkar Hall of residence, IIT Kharagpur for the session 2020-2021. Responsible for Managing Participation of Hall Boarders in various Technology events organized by Institute throughout the year
